summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Flowtym Data Hub Phase 1 module. All 18 tests passed (100%). Tested 5 mocked connectors (Mews PMS, Booking.com OTA, D-EDGE Channel Manager, Stripe Payment, Lighthouse Rate Shopper), sync operations, reservation normalization, market data endpoints, and event bus.
passed_tests: GET /api/datahub/connectors/available - Returns 5 registered connectors (mews, booking_com, dedge, stripe, lighthouse)
POST /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/sync with Mews - Syncs reservations successfully
POST /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/sync with Booking.com - Syncs reservations successfully
POST /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/sync with D-EDGE - Syncs reservations successfully
GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/reservations - Lists normalized reservations with pagination
GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/reservations/{id} - Returns single reservation with transformation_log
GET /api/datahub/hotels/{hotel_id}/events - Returns event bus events list
Reservation normalization quality verified (tenant_id, source_system, transformation_log, all required fields)
critical_code_review_comments: Data is stored in-memory (_reservations, _guests, _sync_history, _events dicts) - will need MongoDB persistence for production
ConnectorConfig.auth stores API keys - ensure encryption at rest when persisting to database
No rate limiting implemented on sync endpoints - consider adding for production
seed_data_creation: Sync operations create mocked reservation data in memory. Each sync generates 5-20 realistic reservations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Hub Phase 1 fully tested. All 5 connectors (Mews, Booking.com, D-EDGE, Stripe, Lighthouse) are MOCKED and return realistic fake data. APIs at /api/datahub/* are functional. Key endpoints: /connectors/available, /hotels/{id}/connectors/{name}/test, /hotels/{id}/sync, /hotels/{id}/reservations, /hotels/{id}/stats, /hotels/{id}/market/competitors, /hotels/{id}/market/demand, /hotels/{id}/market/parity, /hotels/{id}/events. Data stored in-memory (not MongoDB yet).

mocked_apis_list: Mews PMS API - /app/backend/datahub/connectors/pms/mews.py - generates realistic mock reservations and guests
Booking.com API - /app/backend/datahub/connectors/ota/booking_com.py - generates realistic mock OTA reservations
D-EDGE Channel Manager API - /app/backend/datahub/connectors/channel/dedge.py - generates multi-channel mock reservations
Stripe Payment API - /app/backend/datahub/connectors/payment/stripe.py - generates mock payment intents and transactions
Lighthouse Rate Shopper API - /app/backend/datahub/connectors/rateshopper/lighthouse.py - generates mock competitor rates, demand, parity

connector_management.list_available: GET /api/datahub/connectors/available - 5 connectors with name, type, display_name, version

sync_operations.mews_sync: POST /api/datahub/hotels/{id}/sync - Mews reservations sync with normalization
sync_operations.booking_com_sync: POST /api/datahub/hotels/{id}/sync - Booking.com reservations sync with normalization

stats_and_events.stats: GET /api/datahub/hotels/{id}/stats - Reservation counts, sync history, channel breakdown
stats_and_events.events: GET /api/datahub/hotels/{id}/events - Event bus with reservation.created events

normalization_quality.multi_tenant: All reservations have tenant_id for multi-tenancy
normalization_quality.traceability: transformation_log tracks field mappings and transformations
normalization_quality.universal_model: Reservations normalized to UniversalReservation with all required fields
